data.body:
[7/4(Fri) Data Patch Notice]

1. Schedule: 7/4(Fri) 9:30 AM (UTC)

2. Target: Steam Client

3. Impact:
While the patch is in progress, you can still engage in gameplay. The updated content will be installed upon Steam re-entry.

4. Details:
- Added a feature that allows you to delink your account within the game when accessing via the STEAM client.

- Fixed an issue where the mute settings did not function correctly on the STEAM client.

- Fixed an issue where emotion expression images were being overlapped by student images in Relationship Stories.
![GvAQLzkbwAAtbEv.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1373/AV4fKCs3AwBgNB0nbydDzghkgL2pj6sR.jpg)
